title: Ultimate Claude Code Guide: How to Use Claude Code for Beginners in 2026
summary: A YouTube tutorial guide on using Claude Code for beginners covers practical application building with AI, including screenshot-based debugging, working with Claude Opus and Sonnet models, and avoiding common mistakes. The guide demonstrates four complete projects: personal landing page, Chrome extension, image-to-caption generator, and habit tracker.
